---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the CLI
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that the tool makes hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like it to do. A concrete CLI shape (flags, command name) helps.

## Scope check

This is a focused subtitle-translation CLI. Some things are deliberately out of scope —
a web UI, for instance, will never be added. If your request touches translation quality,
context handling, or provider support, it's likely in scope; if it's a new interface or a
general-purpose feature, please say why it belongs here.

## Alternatives considered

Anything you already tried or rejected.
